title: Fix mkdirSync static import and verify gates
description: Confirm mkdirSync is statically imported from "fs" at top of src/store/graph.ts, save() has no await, then run npm run build, npm test, and npm run lint to verify all gates pass. Update CLAUDE.md known-issues entry once gates are green.

plan.objective: Verify that src/store/graph.ts correctly imports mkdirSync via static import and that save() is synchronous, then run gate suite to confirm fix validates acceptance criteria
key_changes: Verification task — code changes appear already in place in working tree
Run npm run build to verify TypeScript compilation succeeds
Run npm test to verify regression guard passes and all tests succeed
Run npm run lint to verify code quality standards are met
Document verification results in PROGRESS.md artifact
Note: CART-B01 bug record does not exist in Forge store or CLAUDE.md

review_plan.objective: Review the plan for CART-S01-T01 to verify it correctly describes verification of the mkdirSync static import fix and gate suite execution
key_changes: mkdirSync confirmed in single top-level static import from fs — no duplicates
save() is fully synchronous — no await keyword anywhere in graph.ts
mkdirSync called before writeFileSync in save() — correct ordering
All three gates pass: build (tsc), test (31/31), lint (eslint)
CART-B01 regression guard test verifies call ordering via invocationCallOrder
AC6 deviation in plan: rewrites criterion without explaining CLAUDE.md has no CART-B01 entry
